parameters.name: Table
parameters.helpText: Target table to update. Accepts table unique_id or table name.

parameters.name: Tables
parameters.helpText: Optional array of table unique_id or names. If provided, the field(s) will be added to all matching tables.

parameters.name: DataType
parameters.helpText: Field data type. Example: String, Datetime, Boolean, Json, Dropdown, Autocomplete.

parameters.name: FieldPayload
parameters.helpText: Full field definition object. Overrides ColumnName/DataType if provided.

parameters.name: Fields
parameters.helpText: Array of field objects to add.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.helpText: Optional default value for the field.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.helpText: Optional semicolon-separated options for Dropdown fields.

parameters.name: Reference
parameters.helpText: Optional reference unique_id for relationship fields.

parameters.name: Key
parameters.helpText: Optional key metadata. Example: Auto Number
